hero.title: Field Training
hero.subtitle: Practical skills for your greenhouse team — minimum theory, maximum field application.

topics.title: Topics
items: EC/pH measurement, drainage analysis, and daily decision-making

format.title: Format
format.text: One-day field session — together with your team in the greenhouse. A brief execution note follows each session.

inquiry.title: Tailored to your team
inquiry.text: We prepare an individual quote based on team size, topic selection, and session format.
